title: Chips rally
description: Nvidia hits record high as chip stocks rally on TSMC outlook, Blackstone builds a ‘performing credit juggernaut’, Traders see 20% chance of .5% rate cut in December, Netflix beat Wall Street expectations, and Google replaces search and ads boss
author: Market Briefing

title: Recession odds
description: China stocks reopen with a roar, DOJ wants to remake Google’s empire, 10-yr Treasury yields shifts lower after crossing 4%, Goldman lowers recession odds to just 15%, and Costco’s gold bars fly off shelves as prices smash records
author: Market Briefing

title: Investors spooked
description: Escalating Middle East tensions spook investors, port strike could reignite inflation, Japan’s ‘carry trade’ slowly begins to unwind, Anthropic hires OpenAI co-founder, and Nike withdraws guidance, stock falls
author: Market Briefing

title: Nike benches CEO
description: Stocks get post-Fed rally, Fed's jumbo cut signals recalibration, Nike replaces CEO with company veteran, Apple Intelligence is now live in public beta, and Buffett’s remaining $34B BofA stake is now pure profit
author: Market Briefing

title: Intel jumps, Boeing freezes
description: Intel shares jump on chip deal with Amazon and Biden awarding Intel up to $3 billion, Boeing freezes hiring in sweeping cost cuts during strike, Sam Altman departs OpenAI’s safety committee, and Larry Ellison dethrones Jeff Bezos as world’s second-richest man
author: Market Briefing

title: Smartphone face-off
description: Trial Day 1: US argues Google created ad tech monopoly, Apple event shows off iPhone 16 with not-quite-ready AI, Huawei’s trifold phone gets 3 million pre-orders ahead of Apple iPhone event, Disney’s ‘playing hardball' with DirecTV, and Big Lots files for bankruptcy
author: Market Briefing

title: PE tackles NFL
description: NFL decides on private equity, Zuck says WH ‘pressured’ Meta to ‘censor’ Covid-19, shares of Temu parent plunge, Eli Lilly slashes weight loss drug prices by half, and Nvidia aims for "show stopper" in earnings report
author: Market Briefing

title: SEC fines Icahn
description: SEC fines Carl Icahn, AMD is going after Nvidia with a $5 billion acquisition, Harris proposes raising the corporate tax rate to 28%, Gold bars are worth a million dollars for the first time, and Trump says he would offer Elon Musk a Cabinet slot
author: Market Briefing

title: Stage set for rate cuts
description: CPI ‘checks the box’ for Fed cuts, here’s the inflation breakdown for July, two alarming signs of recessions emerge, Berkshire discloses surprise stake in Ulta Beauty, and WeRide gets approval to carry passengers in California
author: Market Briefing

title: Smart money buys dip
description: Smart money buys the dip, don’t expect the Fed to panic, Sell-off in Japan's stocks is overdone, Airbnb shares drop 14% due to slowing demand, and sleepy utilities sector becomes haven from turbulence...Global stocks fall as recession fears grow, Judge rules Google is an illegal monopoly, Wall Sreet 'fear gauge' logs record jump, Japanese stocks soar as wider markets bounce from brutal selloff, and JPMorgan trading desk says ‘getting close’ to buy-the-dip opportunity
author: Market Briefing

title: Fear sweeps markets
description: Alarm bells for an economic downturn are clanging, investors left to guess where stocks go next, Berkshire cuts Apple stake by half, sharp slowdown in job growth, and Musk says Fed foolish not to have cut rates
author: Market Briefing

title: Volatility returns
description: Stocks sell off a day after furious rally, Apple sluggishness in China casts shadow on upbeat results, DOJ investigating Nvidia’s acquisition, US probes surging grocery prices, and Intel to cut 15,000+ jobs
author: Market Briefing
